findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem (groupLikeTensor_coact|trivialTensor_coact)(\\s|$)|theorem (groupLike_coact|trivial_coact)(\\s|$)" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Trivial.lean` finds only `groupLike_coact` at line 92 and `trivial_coact` at line 308; the new tensor API only has `groupLikeTensor_coact_apply`/`_tmul` at lines 222/231 and `trivialTensor_coact_apply`/`_tmul` at lines 388/396.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp] theorem groupLikeTensor_coact ... = (TensorProduct.mk R (M ⊗[R] N) C).flip ((g * h : GroupLike R C) : C)` and `@[simp] theorem trivialTensor_coact ... = (TensorProduct.mk R (M ⊗[R] N) C).flip (1 : C)`.
findings.issue: `groupLikeTensor` and `trivialTensor` lack map-level coaction lemmas analogous to the existing `groupLike_coact` and `trivial_coact`, so downstream code must use pointwise extensionality or unfold aliases to rewrite `coact` as a linear map.

summary: The new tensor-product structures expose pointwise coaction simp lemmas, but the characteristic API is incomplete at the linear-map level.
